reasoning: Both audits skipped source review due to download failure during makepkg --nobuild. Without examining source files (build scripts, binaries), safety cannot be determined.
coverage_issues: Critical gap: Source tarball unreviewed. Contains build scripts, binaries, and install hooks that execute during makepkg
No review of files in $srcdir that handle network/filesystem operations
false_negatives: Potential risks in unreviewed source files: build scripts could contain malicious commands, binaries could have hidden behaviors
re_audit_focus: Source tarball contents (especially build scripts, install hooks)
learnings: Improve download failure handling: retry mechanisms, fallback mirrors
Prioritize PKGBUILD + .install files first to catch download issues earlier
Flag packages with unreviewed source as inconclusive by default
Add warning when >50% critical files (build/install scripts) are skipped
